mapper.select:
select ps.`id`, ps.`address`, ps.`macAddress`, ps.`macAddress5G`, ps.`time`, ps.`size`, ps.`sendQuantity`, ps.`receiveQuantity`, ps.`packetLossRate`, ps.`avgRTT`, ps.`minRTT`, ps.`maxRTT`, ps.`meanDifference`, ps.`sceneId`, ps.`areaId`, ps.`apId`, ps.`speedometer`, scene.`name` sceneName, area.`name` areaName, ap.`name` apName FROM pingspeed ps LEFT JOIN scene ON ps.`sceneId`=scene.`id` LEFT JOIN area ON ps.`areaId`=area.`id` LEFT JOIN ap ON ps.`apId`=ap.`id` where 1=1 and ps.`speedometer` like CONCAT('%',#{speedometer},'%') and ps.time >= DATE_FORMAT(#{startTime},'%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') and ps.time <= DATE_FORMAT(#{endTime},'%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
AND ps.`sceneId` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sceneId},'%')
AND ps.`areaId` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{areaId},'%')
AND ps.`apId` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{apId},'%')
ORDER BY ps.`time` DESC

select ps.`id`, ps.`address`, ps.`macAddress`, ps.`macAddress5G`, ps.`time`, ps.`size`, ps.`sendQuantity`, ps.`receiveQuantity`, ps.`packetLossRate`, ps.`avgRTT`, ps.`minRTT`, ps.`maxRTT`, ps.`meanDifference`, ps.`sceneId`, ps.`areaId`, ps.`apId`, ps.`speedometer`, scene.`name` sceneName, area.`name` areaName, ap.`name` apName FROM pingspeed ps LEFT JOIN scene ON ps.`sceneId`=scene.`id` LEFT JOIN area ON ps.`areaId`=area.`id` LEFT JOIN ap ON ps.`apId`=ap.`id` where ps.id=#{id}
